name: maccing-notion
description: Notion API engineering reference for coding agents: building/editing databases via the data_sources model, formulas (and their empirically-verified gotchas), rollups, relations, views/charts, page blocks & positioning, multi-currency formatting, and debugging Notion API errors. Complements the official makenotion/claude-code-notion-plugin (high-level workflows) with the low-level API/formula details.
